revision.text:
'''丁丑'''（ひのとうし、ていちゅう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて14番目で、前は[[丙子]]、次は[[戊寅]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は火、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（火生土）である。
==丁丑の年==
==丁丑の日== ===[[選日]]=== 丁丑の日は[[犯土]]間日である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings
revision.text: #redirect[[en:丁丑]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''丁丑'''（ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの14番目で、前は[[丙子]]、次は[[戊寅]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[丁]]は陰の[[火]]、[[十二支]]の[[丑]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（火生土）である。
==丁丑の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って17が余る年が丁丑の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''丁丑の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[17年]] *[[77年]] *[[137年]] *[[197年]] *[[257年]] *[[317年]] *[[377年]] *[[437年]] *[[497年]] *[[557年]] *[[617年]] *[[677年]] *[[737年]] *[[797年]] *[[857年]] *[[917年]] *[[977年]] | *[[1037年]] *[[1097年]] *[[1157年]] *[[1217年]] *[[1277年]] *[[1337年]] *[[1397年]] *[[1457年]] *[[1517年]] *[[1577年]] *[[1637年]] *[[1697年]] *[[1757年]] *[[1817年]] *[[1877年]] *[[1937年]] *[[1997年]] | *[[2057年]] *[[2117年]] *[[2177年]] *[[2237年]] *[[2297年]] *[[2357年]] *[[2417年]] *[[2477年]] *[[2537年]] *[[2597年]] *[[2657年]] *[[2717年]] *[[2777年]] *[[2837年]] *[[2897年]] *[[2957年]] |}
==丁丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[12月]]が丁丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==丁丑の日== 丁丑の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 丁丑の日は[[犯土]]間日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:丁丑]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:丁丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:丁丑]]

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''丁丑'''（ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの14番目で、前は[[丙子]]、次は[[戊寅]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[丁]]は陰の[[火]]、[[十二支]]の[[丑]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（火生土）である。
==丁丑の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って17が余る年が丁丑の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''丁丑の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[17年]] *[[77年]] *[[137年]] *[[197年]] *[[257年]] *[[317年]] *[[377年]] *[[437年]] *[[497年]] *[[557年]] *[[617年]] *[[677年]] *[[737年]] *[[797年]] *[[857年]] *[[917年]] *[[977年]] | *[[1037年]] *[[1097年]] *[[1157年]] *[[1217年]] *[[1277年]] *[[1337年]] *[[1397年]] *[[1457年]] *[[1517年]] *[[1577年]] *[[1637年]] *[[1697年]] *[[1757年]] *[[1817年]] *[[1877年]] *[[1937年]] *[[1997年]] | *[[2057年]] *[[2117年]] *[[2177年]] *[[2237年]] *[[2297年]] *[[2357年]] *[[2417年]] *[[2477年]] *[[2537年]] *[[2597年]] *[[2657年]] *[[2717年]] *[[2777年]] *[[2837年]] *[[2897年]] *[[2957年]] |}
==丁丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[12月]]が丁丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==丁丑の日== 丁丑の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 丁丑の日は[[犯土]]間日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Fire Ox-qq]] [[Category:丁丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:丁丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Fire Ox-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:丁丑]]

==丁丑の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って17が余る年が丁丑の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''丁丑の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[17年]] *[[77年]] *[[137年]] *[[197年]] *[[257年]] *[[317年]] *[[377年]] *[[437年]] *[[497年]] *[[557年]] *[[617年]] *[[677年]] *[[737年]] *[[797年]] *[[857年]] *[[917年]] *[[977年]] | *[[1037年]] *[[1097年]] *[[1157年]] *[[1217年]] *[[1277年]] *[[1337年]] *[[1397年]] *[[1457年]] *[[1517年]] *[[1577年]] *[[1637年]] *[[1697年]] *[[1757年]] *[[1817年]] *[[1877年]] *[[1937年]] *[[1997年]] | *[[2057年]] *[[2117年]] *[[2177年]] *[[2237年]] *[[2297年]] *[[2357年]] *[[2417年]] *[[2477年]] *[[2537年]] *[[2597年]] *[[2657年]] *[[2717年]] *[[2777年]] *[[2837年]] *[[2897年]] *[[2957年]] |}
==丁丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[12月]]が丁丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

==丁丑の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って17が余る年が丁丑の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''丁丑の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[17年]] *[[77年]] *[[137年]] *[[197年]] *[[257年]] *[[317年]] *[[377年]] *[[437年]] *[[497年]] *[[557年]] *[[617年]] *[[677年]] *[[737年]] *[[797年]] *[[857年]] *[[917年]] *[[977年]] | *[[1037年]] *[[1097年]] *[[1157年]] *[[1217年]] *[[1277年]] *[[1337年]] *[[1397年]] *[[1457年]] *[[1517年]] *[[1577年]] *[[1637年]] *[[1697年]] *[[1757年]] *[[1817年]] *[[1877年]] *[[1937年]] *[[1997年]] | *[[2057年]] *[[2117年]] *[[2177年]] *[[2237年]] *[[2297年]] *[[2357年]] *[[2417年]] *[[2477年]] *[[2537年]] *[[2597年]] *[[2657年]] *[[2717年]] *[[2777年]] *[[2837年]] *[[2897年]] *[[2957年]] |}
==丁丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[12月]]が丁丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==丁丑の日== 丁丑の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 丁丑の日は[[犯土]]間日である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Fire Ox-qq]] [[Category:丁丑]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:丁丑]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Fire Ox-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Fire Ox}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[ja:丁丑]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Fire Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Fire Ox]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Fire Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[sn:Yin Fire Ox]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Fire Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Fire Ox]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Fire Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yin Fire Ox]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[ja:Yin Fire Ox]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062543]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Ox|kanji=丁丑|romaji=hinoto ushi|onyomi=teichū|p=dīngchǒu|w=ting-ch'ou|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 chau2|j=deng1 chau2|ci=tɛŋ tsʰɐu̯|mc=tæŋ tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=tæŋ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire Earthly Branches]]’ {{ill|Ox|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox Generation|lt_ja=相生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Fire generates Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Ox (丁丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: teichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongchuk (정축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Sửu

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire {{ill|Ox|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and they interact by {{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Fire generates Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Ox (丁丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: teichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongchuk (정축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Sửu

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]’ {{ill|Ox|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and they interact by {{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Fire generates Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Ox (丁丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: teichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongchuk (정축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Fire Ox (丁丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのとうし (hinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: ていかのうし (teika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: ていちゅう (teichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Fire Ox== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 17 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|Year]] of Teichuu. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Teichuu''' |- ! ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Ox (丁丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: teichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongchuk (정축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Sửu

==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire {{ill|Ox|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Fire generates Earth).

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Fire generates Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Ox (丁丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: teichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongchuk (정축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Fire Ox (丁丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのとうし (hinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: ていかのうし (teika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: ていちゅう (teichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Fire Ox== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 17 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|Year]] of Teichuu. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Teichuu''' |- ! ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
