{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin ==Months of Yin Fire Ox== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:December|December]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Ox== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Fire Ox==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|December|en|December|WD=Q126|lt=December}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Minor Cold}} until the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Ox==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Ox also known as  Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire ==Months of Yin Fire Ox==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|December|en|December|WD=Q126|lt=December}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Minor Cold}} until the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Ox==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yin Fire Ox also known as  Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing ==Months of Yin Fire Ox==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|December|en|December|WD=Q126|lt=December}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Minor Cold}} until the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Ox==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Ox|kanji=丁丑|romaji=hinoto ushi|onyomi=teichū|p=dīngchǒu|w=ting-ch'ou|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 chau2|j=deng1 chau2|ci=tɛŋ tsʰɐu̯|mc=tæŋ tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=tæŋ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Ox also known as  Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}}’ {{ill|Ox|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Ox (丁丑)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-ushi
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-ushi
***Onyomi 1: teichū
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongchuk (정축)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Sửu

==Years of Yin Fire Ox==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 17 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=Year}} of Teichuu.

==Months of Yin Fire Ox==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|December|en|December|WD=Q126|lt=December}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Minor Cold}} until the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Ox==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Ox also known as  Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}}’ {{ill|Ox|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Sửu

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Ox also known as  Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa ==Pronunciation==

** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 cau2
**  Japanese:

***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-ushi
***Onyomi 1: teichū
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongchuk (정축)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Sửu

==Months of Yin Fire Ox==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|December|en|December|WD=Q126|lt=December|1=December}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Minor Cold|1=Xiaohan}} until the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Ox==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yin Fire Ox also known as  Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Fire Ox==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|December|en|December|WD=Q126|lt=December|1=December}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Minor Cold|1=Xiaohan}} until the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}}) as applicable.

==Months of Yin Fire Ox==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|December|en|December|WD=Q126|lt=December|1=December}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Minor Cold|1=Xiaohan}} until the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Ox==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Ox also known as  Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa ==Months of Yin Fire Ox==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|December|en|December|WD=Q126|lt=December|1=December}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Minor Cold|1=Xiaohan}} until the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Ox==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
